titleStmt.title: SII 38.485: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 485. (A.R. No. 485 of 1912.) TIRUTTUṞAIPPŪṆḌI, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the north and west bases, Navagraha shrine, Marundīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Kulōttuṅgachōḷa who took Madurai and was pleased to take the crowned head of the Pāṇḍya Year: 18, Vṛiśchika śu. di 15, Saturday, Rōhiṇi = 18th November 1195 A.D.

summary.p: It records that in a dispute between the ūrār and the temple authorities over a quarter vēli of land, the ūrār of Chāttamaṅgalam gave up their claims on the said land in favour of the temple at Tiruttuṟaipūṇdi in Vaṇḍāḻaivēḷūr-kkūṟṟam in Rājēndrachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu. The temple authorities claimed that they bought this land in auction and ultimately the ūrār gave up their claims, and also made the land taxfree and gave it to the temple.
Pūṇḍi-uḍaiyāṉ Muṉaittāṉ Tiruttūṟai-nāyagaṉ, Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyāṉ and several others figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śvatiśrīRead svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ maturai koṇṭu pāṇṭiyaṉai muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrī kulottuṅkacoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu patiṉeṭṭāvatu vraścika nāyaṟṟup pūrvapakṣattu pañcadaśiyuñRead pañcamiyu caṉikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa rocaṇināḷ Irācentiracoḻavaḷanāṭṭu vaṇṭāḻai veḷurkkūṟṟattu Uṭaiyār tiruttuṟaippūṇṭi Uṭaiyār koyil Āticaṇḍeśvaratevarkku Innāṭṭuc cāttamaṅkalattu Ūravararom
Icaivutiṭṭuk kuṭutta paricāvatu Iccāttamaṅkalattu murukkaṅkuḷattukkut teṟkil viḷainilattuk koḻukuttikkum koṟṟavāyiluṭaiyāṉ Āṭiyanāyaka ṉilattuk koyilukku kkut teṟkup peruvaḻikku Araikkol taṟai potuvāka vaḻi nikki Itaṉ teṟkukkaṭṭiṉa muḷḷivāyp perāṟṟut � kkāṉa kulaikkuk kiḻakkum Innāyaṉār tevatāṉattukku vaṭakkum meṟkum nir nilaiyuṭpaṭa mikutikkuṟaivu vuṭ paṭṭanilam kāl Innilaṅkālum Inta Āticaṇṭeśvaratevar tiru
nāmattu rājarājapperuvilai koṇṭa nilameṉṟu Ikkoyiṟ tāṉattārum Eṅkaḷur nilameṉṟu nāṅkaḷum māṟṟac curukkappaṭṭu vantamaiyil Innilattu Eṅkaḷur nilamāy Eṅkaḷukku soma varuvatuṇṭākiluḷḷutum Iṟṟai nāḷāl Inta Āticaṇṭeśvaratevar
cikatattatile nirvārttuk kuṭuttu Iṉṉilam Ittevaṟku somamāka Iṟaiyiliyākacceytu kuṭuttu Ivvicaivi tiṭṭukkuṭuttom Ic cāttamaṅkalattu Ūrom Ivarkaḷ paṇikka Ivvicaivu tiṭṭeḻutiṉeṉ Ivvūr kāṇiyuṭaiya pūṇṭiyuṭaiyāṉ muṉaittāṉ tiruttuṟaināyakaṉeṉ Ivai E
ṉṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku yākaiyuṭaiyāṉ Ava tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku � ttamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ vaṇṭāḻai nāṭṭuk karaivaḻi Ippaṭiyaṟiveṉ nā ṭaiyāṉ ṭaiyār pallavarāyar kaṉmikaḷil kaliṅkaruṭaiya ḷāṉ sadhiñaiyā
ṉamaikkup perum ṭaiyāṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai muravurāṉa tiruvaḻuntūr nāṭṭuk koṉ Ippaṭikku Ivai cātta maṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ tevaṉ kuṉṟaṉāṉa ku ṇṭāḻai nāṭṭu veḷāṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikki cātta maṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ vaṇṭāḻai nāṭṭukkoṉ Eḻuttu Itu muṉ ṭai Ivai camaya muppaṭivuṭaiyāṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku vaṇṭāḻai veḷur kūṟṟattu Ivai kuṟukkaiyuṭaiyāṉe Ivai Iṅkaṇāṭṭu veḷāṉeḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 38.485 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
